articles.title: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
articles.summary: Hey HN! Lathe is an experiment in using LLMs to teach me something new, instead of doing the work for me. It generates a hands-on, source-backed tutorial for any technical topic you want to learn. Then you work through it yourself by reading and typing the code by hand ( gasp )...
